working_on.feature: Redeem API + Admin Login + Web Admin Auth
working_on.task: All completed — next: test login page, then ZNS notifications
working_on.notes: Tất cả build clean. Backend + Frontend verified. Seed đã chạy trên DB.

pending_tasks.task: Test login page trên Web Admin (http://localhost:3001/login)
pending_tasks.notes: Account: 0123456789 / 123456. Login page đã tạo, cần test actual flow.

pending_tasks.task: Web Admin: Auth middleware — redirect /login nếu chưa có token
pending_tasks.notes: Hiện tại tất cả routes public, chưa có guard. Cần middleware check localStorage admin_token.

pending_tasks.task: Implement ZNS notifications (thăng hạng, hoa hồng, bill)
pending_tasks.notes: TODO comments đã để sẵn trong webhook.service.ts và transactions.service.ts. Cần tài khoản Zalo OA.

pending_tasks.task: Admin: Edit functionality cho Rewards, Discount Tiers
pending_tasks.notes: Hiện chỉ có Add/Delete, chưa có Edit form

pending_tasks.task: Multi-branch management: Permission cho manager xem bill cross-branch
Production: CUKCUK signature guard nên dùng HMAC-SHA256 per-branch
Monthly spending reset (cron job đầu tháng)
pending_tasks.notes: monthly_spending hiện chỉ cộng, chưa có logic reset

recent_changes.description: Web Admin Login Page + Backend admin-login API (bcrypt). Seed admin account 0123456789/123456. ConditionalLayout ẩn sidebar tại /login.
ZMA: Redeem modal bị nằm dưới viewport khi page chưa scroll. Fix: thay zmp-ui Modal bằng createPortal(modal, document.body) — luôn position:fixed giữa màn hình.
Seed 8 rewards catalog + 4 discount tiers vào DB. Dùng upsert với fixed UUID, an toàn re-run.

Redeem API: POST /api/v1/members/me/redeem. Atomic Prisma transaction: validate points > create Redemption (voucher_code ZDC-V-xxx) > create PointTransaction > update member balance > increment quantityRedeemed. ZMA redeemItemAtom gọi API thật thay vì local. Redeem modal async/await + loading state.
ZMA: Thay mock data bằng API thật cho rewards, discount-tiers, vouchers

errors_encountered.error: JwtStrategy requires a secret or key
errors_encountered.solution: JWT_SECRET was missing in .env, added JWT_SECRET=zodutcan-secret-key-2026
Kill conflicting process before restarting NestJS

errors_encountered.error: Event handlers cannot be passed to Client Component props (onClick on <tr>)
errors_encountered.solution: Created ClickableRow client component wrapper instead of onClick on server-rendered <tr>

errors_encountered.error: zmp-ui Modal stuck at bottom of page (position:relative inside Page scroll container)
errors_encountered.solution: Replaced zmp-ui Modal with createPortal(modal, document.body) — custom overlay with position:fixed, always centered on viewport.

errors_encountered.error: Jotai async atom redeem() returns Promise but component used it synchronously
errors_encountered.solution: Made handleConfirm async, added await + loading state + try/finally

errors_encountered.error: PowerShell curl = Invoke-WebRequest alias, not actual curl

decisions_made.decision: Admin APIs in separate src/admin/ folder
decisions_made.reason: Tách biệt admin logic khỏi customer-facing API

decisions_made.decision: Web Admin gọi backend API (lib/api.ts) thay vì direct Prisma cho Members
decisions_made.reason: Centralize business logic ở backend, frontend chỉ hiển thị

decisions_made.decision: ClickableRow client component cho table row navigation
decisions_made.reason: Next.js Server Components không cho pass onClick, cần client wrapper
ZMA cần hiển thị catalog trước khi member login
Voucher là data riêng của member

decisions_made.decision: Admin delete member chặn nếu có transactions
decisions_made.reason: Bảo toàn data integrity, member có giao dịch không được xóa

decisions_made.decision: createPortal thay vì CSS override cho zmp-ui Modal
decisions_made.reason: CSS override không đủ vì Modal render inside Page DOM — Portal escape hoàn toàn

decisions_made.decision: Admin login dùng bcryptjs (không bcrypt native)
decisions_made.reason: bcryptjs pure JS, không cần native build tools trên Windows

decisions_made.decision: ConditionalLayout client component cho root layout
decisions_made.reason: Next.js nested layouts không cho override parent — cần client-side pathname check
MVP đơn giản, production nên dùng httpOnly cookie
